---
title: "Augusta Boevey Pode"
---

## Augusta Boevey Pode

**Dates:** (1829/30- 28 June 1900)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

She was the youngest daughter of the Rev. Charles Crawley (cousin of WCY) and his wife, WCY\'s sister Catharina (Yonge) Crawley. She married (30 Aug 1860) her cousin John Duke Pode (nephew of WCY).

### Letters

- Letter from March 24 [1900]
- Letter from December 14 1895
- Letter from Decr 21st 1882
- Letter from Aug 19th 1877 
- Letter from Feb 26th 1876
- Letter from Novr 8th 1875
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 24th [1864[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864
- Letter from May 31st 1864
- Letter from March 11th 1864
- Letter from Jan 20th [1862]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
